news.t: Widespread Drought Adds to Stresses for U.S. Farmers. Food Prices Are a Focus.
Teucrium Launches Agricultural Strategy No K-1 ETF (TILL)

overview.description: The Teucrium Agricultural Strategy No K-1 ETF (TILL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad market commodities. The fund is an actively managed portfolio that holds four agricultural commodities futures contracts: corn, wheat, soybeans, and sugar. The contract selection is optimized at the fund advisers discretion, based on the shape of the futures curve to minimize contango. TILL was launched on May 16, 2022 and is issued by Teucrium.

data.title: Widespread Drought Adds to Stresses for U.S. Farmers. Food Prices Are a Focus.
data.text: Just in time for the start of the growing season, the National Drought Mitigation Center's latest data says that 51% of U.S. states and Puerto Rico are in moderate drought or worse.

data.title: Teucrium Launches Agricultural Strategy No K-1 ETF (TILL)
data.text: BURLINGTON, Vt.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Teucrium Trading, LLC, the Sponsor of agricultural futures-based ETFs, today announced that the Teucrium Agricultural Strategy No K-1 ETF (“TILL” or “the Fund”) will ...
